narrative:
Bay 1 (Pcs) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 884 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
